title: Health Reminder
lead: Track sedentary monitoring, today's activity rhythm, and reminder settings in one focused panel.
noActiveWindow: No active work window right now
chartsLead: Review today's active time by app and by hour.
workWindowDescription: Trigger a sedentary reminder after this much continuous work.
breakDescription: Treat the current work session as rested after this much inactivity.
notifyDescription: Send a native system notification when a sedentary reminder fires.
recordWindowTitleDescription: Include foreground window titles in activity details for better stats.
fullscreenDescription: Show a fullscreen action overlay on every display when a reminder fires.
waterDescription: Show in-app hydration reminders on a fixed interval.
retainDaysDescription: Activity details older than this will be cleaned up.
settingsLead: These settings are written back as the complete local health reminder config.
enabledDescription: When disabled, activity sampling stops and health reminders will not fire.
hourlyCaption: See when your active time is concentrated.
reminderTitle: Time to stand up and move 🌿
reminderBody: You've been working for a while. Stand up and stretch a bit.
waterBody: Remember to stay hydrated. Have a sip of water.
